description: Three-track weighted audit system for forensic animation quality assessment. Split evaluation into forensic clarity (40%), physical plausibility (35%), and cinematic presentation (25%) with per-track minimum gates and integrated regression testing.

metadata.purpose: Structured, reproducible quality assessment with clear minimum standards per track and confidence intervals

forensic_clarity.description: Evidence readability and forensic accuracy — can a jury understand the reconstruction and evidence positioning?

criteria.name: evidence_marker_visibility
criteria.description: Are all required markers, labels, and scale bars clearly legible and forensically accurate?

scoring_rubric.10: All markers present, crisply legible, forensically positioned, no ambiguity
scoring_rubric.9: All markers present and legible, minor positioning refinements needed
scoring_rubric.8: All required markers visible, mostly legible, some contrast issues
scoring_rubric.7: All required markers present but contrast could improve
scoring_rubric.6: Some markers missing or difficult to read
scoring_rubric.below_6: Critical markers invisible or illegible — fail

criteria.name: spatial_relationships
criteria.description: Are distances, angles, relative positions, and spatial layout clearly communicated and measurable?

scoring_rubric.10: All distances, angles clearly marked and measurable with precision indicators
scoring_rubric.9: All relationships clear, minor measurement ambiguities
scoring_rubric.8: Relationships visible, some measurements could be clearer
scoring_rubric.7: Basic spatial arrangement understandable, precision uncertain
scoring_rubric.6: Spatial relationships partially clear, ambiguities present

criteria.name: damage_documentation
criteria.description: Is impact damage visible, documented, and forensically meaningful for injury analysis and liability determination?

scoring_rubric.10: All damage zones crisply visible, clearly correspond to injury patterns, forensically defensible
scoring_rubric.9: Damage well-documented, minor clarity issues, strong injury correlation
scoring_rubric.8: Damage visible, generally corresponds to injuries, some zones unclear
scoring_rubric.7: Key damage zones visible, basic injury correspondence evident
scoring_rubric.6: Some damage visible, limited injury correlation
scoring_rubric.below_6: Critical damage zones not visible — fail

criteria.name: sight_line_clarity
criteria.description: Can viewers trace what each party could see? Are visibility limitations and obstruction zones clearly shown?

scoring_rubric.10: Sight lines animated with clear begin/end points, obstruction zones marked, visibility windows explicit
scoring_rubric.9: Sight lines clearly visible with minor annotation improvements
scoring_rubric.8: Sight lines identifiable, some obstruction ambiguity
scoring_rubric.7: General sight line direction understandable, detail unclear
scoring_rubric.6: Sight lines partially visible, significant ambiguity
scoring_rubric.below_6: Sight lines not clearly demonstrated — fail

criteria.name: timeline_readability
criteria.description: Is the sequence of events clear from the animation? Can viewers understand temporal progression and causation?

scoring_rubric.10: Timeline clearly marked with timestamps, causation explicit, no ambiguity about sequence
scoring_rubric.9: Sequence clear with minor temporal annotation improvements
scoring_rubric.8: General sequence understandable, some timing ambiguity
scoring_rubric.7: Basic before/during/after structure evident, details unclear

physical_plausibility.description: Lighting, material realism, and physics accuracy — does the reconstruction look physically real and scientifically defensible?

criteria.name: lighting_realism
criteria.description: Are light sources physically plausible, color temperatures accurate, and falloff realistic for the scene time/location?

scoring_rubric.10: Light sources physically accurate, color temps correct per time, inverse-square falloff evident, no artificial artifacts
scoring_rubric.9: Lighting realistic with minor color/intensity refinements
scoring_rubric.8: Lighting plausible, some color temperature or falloff inconsistencies
scoring_rubric.7: General lighting direction and intensity reasonable, detailed accuracy varies
scoring_rubric.6: Lighting somewhat realistic but with notable inaccuracies
scoring_rubric.below_6: Lighting unrealistic or physically implausible — fail

criteria.name: material_accuracy
criteria.description: Do vehicle materials, road surfaces, and environmental objects have realistic reflectance, roughness, and subsurface scattering properties?

scoring_rubric.10: All materials PBR-accurate with appropriate roughness, metallic, specular properties; worn surfaces realistic
scoring_rubric.9: Materials realistic with minor property refinements
scoring_rubric.8: Material properties plausible, some roughness or specular inaccuracies
scoring_rubric.7: General material character correct, detailed properties approximate
scoring_rubric.6: Material representation somewhat realistic but with notable inaccuracies
scoring_rubric.below_6: Materials unrealistic or clearly wrong for object type — fail

criteria.name: shadow_consistency
criteria.description: Are shadows cast correctly from all light sources, consistent with geometry, and do they evolve naturally through time?

scoring_rubric.10: All shadows properly cast, geometrically correct, moving smoothly with light sources, no artifacts
scoring_rubric.9: Shadows correct with minor temporal inconsistencies
scoring_rubric.8: Shadows mostly correct, some geometric or temporal anomalies
scoring_rubric.7: General shadow direction correct, detailed geometry approximate
scoring_rubric.6: Shadows somewhat realistic but with notable inaccuracies
scoring_rubric.below_6: Shadows physically impossible or missing — fail

criteria.name: vehicle_proportions
criteria.description: Are vehicle models accurate to year/make/model? Do proportions, wheelbase, and stance match reference specifications?

scoring_rubric.10: Vehicle models match OEM specs precisely, proportions perfect, wear patterns authentic
scoring_rubric.9: Models accurate with minor dimension variations
scoring_rubric.8: Models generally correct, some dimensional approximation
scoring_rubric.7: Model recognizable and approximately correct, minor details approximate
scoring_rubric.6: Model somewhat accurate but with notable dimensional errors
scoring_rubric.below_6: Model incorrect or misidentified vehicle — fail

criteria.name: environmental_accuracy
criteria.description: Is the road geometry correct? Are environmental objects, buildings, and surroundings accurate to the incident location?

scoring_rubric.10: Environment matches accident site precisely, road geometry verified, all objects correctly positioned
scoring_rubric.9: Environment accurate with minor detail variations
scoring_rubric.8: Environment generally correct, some object approximations
scoring_rubric.7: General scene layout recognizable, specific details approximate
scoring_rubric.6: Environment somewhat representative but with notable inaccuracies
scoring_rubric.below_6: Environment incorrect or clearly different from actual site — fail

cinematic_presentation.description: Composition, color grading, and motion quality — is the reconstruction professionally presented and visually compelling?

criteria.name: camera_composition
criteria.description: Are camera angles chosen for clear evidence communication? Does composition follow forensic principles while maintaining visual interest?

scoring_rubric.10: Camera angles exemplary, evidence clearly framed, multiple perspectives reinforce forensic narrative, no visual confusion
scoring_rubric.9: Composition strong with minor angle refinements
scoring_rubric.8: Composition solid, evidence well-framed, some angles could be more effective
scoring_rubric.7: Composition adequate, evidence visible, some awkward framing
scoring_rubric.6: Composition acceptable though uninspired, minor framing issues
scoring_rubric.below_6: Composition confusing or obstructs forensic understanding — fail

criteria.name: color_grading
criteria.description: Is the color palette appropriate to time/location? Is grading consistent, avoiding unrealistic saturation or unnatural color casts?

scoring_rubric.10: Color grading professional, appropriate to time/location, consistent throughout, no unnatural casts
scoring_rubric.9: Grading strong with minor color refinements
scoring_rubric.8: Grading solid, some color inconsistencies or slight unnaturalness
scoring_rubric.7: General color tone appropriate, minor grading issues
scoring_rubric.6: Color acceptable but with grading inconsistencies

criteria.name: depth_of_field
criteria.description: Is depth of field applied judiciously to guide viewer focus without obscuring evidence? Or is it omitted appropriately for maximum clarity?

scoring_rubric.10: DOF applied strategically to guide focus to evidence, focus pull smooth if dynamic, never obscures critical details
scoring_rubric.9: DOF effective with minor focus adjustment
scoring_rubric.7: DOF present, generally appropriate, some misalignment with intended focus
scoring_rubric.below_6: DOF obscures evidence or distracts viewer — fail

criteria.name: motion_smoothness
criteria.description: Are camera and object movements smooth and believable? Are collision dynamics realistic and free of jitter or unrealistic accelerations?

scoring_rubric.10: All motion smooth and natural, collision dynamics realistic, no jitter or artifacts, temporal flow logical
scoring_rubric.9: Motion smooth with minor physics refinement
scoring_rubric.8: Motion generally smooth, minor timing or physics issues
scoring_rubric.7: Motion acceptable, some jitter or timing awkwardness

criteria.name: overall_polish
criteria.description: Is the final product professional, free of artifacts, and ready for presentation? Are rendering, compression, and format suitable for courtroom use?

scoring_rubric.10: Professional quality, no artifacts, pristine format, courtroom-ready, all technical specs met
scoring_rubric.9: High quality with minor technical refinements
scoring_rubric.8: Good quality, minor artifacts or format adjustments needed
scoring_rubric.6: Presentable but with noticeable quality issues
scoring_rubric.below_6: Quality issues prevent professional use — fail

gate_logic.description: ALL track minimum gates must pass for overall approval. Score >= 8.5 AND all tracks >= their minimum thresholds.

confidence_intervals.description: Multi-sample audit with exposure variance computes confidence band and flags inconsistent results
confidence_intervals.exposure_variance_description: Render at reduced, normal, and increased exposure to test robustness across display conditions

confidence_reporting.interpretation_guidance: Std < 0.3: High consistency; 0.3-0.5: Moderate consistency; > 0.5: Low consistency, resample

fix_effectiveness_tracking.description: Log every fix action with before/after scores to auto-promote effective fixes and demote ineffective ones

tracking_schema.fix_family: string [lighting, geometry, materials, composition, grading, physics]
tracking_schema.fix_description: string detailed description of action taken
tracking_schema.iterations: integer number of refinements within fix family

persistence.format: jsonl one fix record per line

rework_budget.description: Automatic strategy escalation when ROI drops below threshold over multiple cycles

strategy_progression.description: Make focused adjustments within current scene/approach
Investigate new rendering methods, materials approaches, or simulation parameters
Pivot from lighting focus to physics focus, or materials to composition
Discard current iteration, return to base scene, restart with improved methodology

regression_suite.description: Hall of failures — re-test against known failure modes every rework cycle to prevent regression

known_failures.root_cause: Light count or intensity zero; scene unlit
Headlights disabled in nighttime scene; fallback ambient insufficient
Camera placed inside vehicle body; no visibility to scene
Direct light on camera lens; no aperture stops or exposure limit
Flat composition; all objects same distance; no layering
Low contrast labels; small font; poor color choice
Physics simulation instability; animation keyframe misalignment
LUT application inconsistency; exposure compensation mismatch

regression_testing_workflow.step_1: Render test samples at baseline quality settings
regression_testing_workflow.step_2: Run each known_failure detection test against samples
regression_testing_workflow.step_3: If any test fails, flag before releasing render
regression_testing_workflow.step_5: Escalate to supervisor if new regression introduced

human_checkpoint.description: Human review triggered only at phase gates, not every cycle, to balance efficiency and oversight

audit_reporting.description: Structured audit report generation after each render cycle
